headline: Coco Robotics Launches with Uber Eats in San Jose, Expanding Autonomous Delivery Across the U.S.
summary: Coco Robotics, the world's largest urban robot delivery platform and recently named one of Fast Company's World's Most Innovative Companies in logistics, today announced the expansion of its autonomous delivery service to San Jose in California. The company's robots are now active, giving residents, workers, and businesses in the city's urban core access to fast, zero-emission last-mile delivery on Uber Eats. headline: Uber Liability Trial Puts Rideshare Risks And Valuation In Focus
summary: A North Carolina federal jury recently found an Uber driver liable for sexual assault but awarded limited damages to the plaintiff. The case is part of a broader multidistrict litigation that challenges Uber's legal status and responsibility for rider safety. The trial raises questions over whether Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) should be treated more like a common carrier rather than a technology platform. Outcomes from this and related cases may influence future trial tactics, settlement...
